title: SOL 2pk Long White Table Cloth Party 274x137cm Plastic Cover Disposable Tablecloths for Parties - Heavy Duty Spill Protection - Opaque Design for Weddings, Buffets, Catering, Outdoor & Theme Events
features: Party Proof - Our 2pk of white table cloth party are made from heavy duty plastic, unlike typical paper disposable tablecloths. This means our plastic table cover offers complete spill protection, and wont damage during your party. [Our white plastic tablecloth measure 274 x 137cm, and are able to cover 2 long tables].

Hide Any Table Underneath - Our disposable table clothes for parties are made with high opacity which means your guests will never get to see what's underneath the covers. Use any two tables, or create one big makeshift buffet table with ease. These white party table cloth are great for any occasion, big or small.

For Party People - Our party table cloth disposable are known as white table cover party, white plastic table cloth white, white disposable tablecloth, table covers white table cloth disposable white cloth table cloths disposable & party tablecloths

Reusable & Disposable - To re-use simply wash with water, dry and fold away to use again. If you want to use this as a disposable table cloth all you need to do is roll it up, and dispose of it properly. Totally easy, convenient and practical either way.

Multi-Purpose - Our 2pk white table cloth rectangular can be used for various occasions and different venues like; restaurants, parties, weddings, outdoor events, catering, gender reveal parties, theme parties and any other special events. If you have a spare it can be used to cover up the floor white table cloths party avoid any spills on the carpet.

Our white plastic tablecloths are made from heavy-duty plastic, offering complete spill protection. They're durable, reusable, and disposable, making them perfect for any party setting. Can these tablecloths cover large tables? Yes, each tablecloth measures 274 x 137 cm, covering two long tables. Their high opacity hides what's underneath, creating a seamless look. How can I reuse these tablecloths? To reuse, simply wash the tablecloths with water, dry, and fold them away for future use. They are designed to be durable and easy to maintain. Are these tablecloths suitable for various events? Absolutely, these tablecloths are perfect for parties, weddings, outdoor events, catering, and more. Their versatility makes them suitable for any occasion. How do I dispose of these tablecloths after use? If you prefer to dispose of them, just roll up the tablecloths and discard them properly. They offer an easy and convenient cleanup solution after any event.
